zh.lifeSummary: Sir William Cheyne是Thomas Cheyne和Emma的兒子，於1334年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾德雷頓 比奧甘。他於1357年與Joane Lambourne在英國巴金哈姆爾德雷頓 比奧甘結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1375年8月29日在英國巴金哈姆爾德雷頓 比奧甘享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特可希頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir William Cheyne是Thomas Cheyne和Emma的儿子，于1334年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾德雷頓 比奧甘。他于1357年与Joane Lambourne在英国巴金哈姆爾德雷頓 比奧甘结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1375年8月29日在英国巴金哈姆爾德雷頓 比奧甘享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特可希頓。

nameMeanings.name: Cheyne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (northeastern Scotland and Shetland): shortened form of   Chaney  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Sir William Cheyne was born in 1334, in Drayton Beauchamp, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Thomas Cheyne and Emma. He married Joane Lambourne in 1357, in Drayton Beauchamp, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 29 August 1375, in Drayton Beauchamp, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Cossington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir William Cheyne est né en 1334, à Drayton Beauchamp, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Thomas Cheyne et Emma. Il a épousé Joane Lambourne en 1357, à Drayton Beauchamp, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 août 1375, à Drayton Beauchamp, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Cossington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Joane Lambourne nel 1357, nel Drayton Beauchamp, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. イギリスブクインガムシュアイアドレイトン ビーウチャンップ
ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Cheyneは1334年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアドレイトン ビーウチャンップでThomas CheyneとEmmaの息子として生まれた。1357年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアドレイトン ビーウチャンップでJoane Lambourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1375年8月29日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアドレイトン ビーウチャンップで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトコシントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Cheyne(은)는 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 드라이턴 보챔프에서 Thomas Cheyne(와)과 Emma의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1357년 영국 벅잉함실르 드라이턴 보챔프에서 Joane Lambourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1375년 8월 29일 영국 벅잉함실르 드라이턴 보챔프에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 코징턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir William Cheyne nasceu em 1334, em Drayton Beauchamp, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Thomas Cheyne e Emma. Ele casou-se com Joane Lambourne em 1357, em Drayton Beauchamp, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Sir William Cheyne родился в 1334 г. в местности дреитон бочамп, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Thomas Cheyne и Emma. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Lambourne в 1357 г. в местности дреитон бочамп, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 августа 1375 г. в местности дреитон бочамп, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности коссингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
